site.title: Outbound-Growth — Premium Outbound Cell with Total Transparency
site.description: Dedicated South African SDR teams for ambitious growth companies. OG Pulse Transparency Dashboard and a full outbound software suite.

hero.headline: High-Performance Outbound for Growth-Focused Teams. Powered by Total Transparency.
hero.subheadline: Scale your pipeline with dedicated South African SDR teams at a 60% lower cost-per-meeting. Eliminate the 'Black Box' with our real-time tracking engine.

solution.label: Our solution
solution.title: SDR-as-a-Service, Fully Transparent.
solution.subtitle: A premium outbound cell—not a black-box agency. ROI-first execution with an open-book view of pipeline creation for teams across multiple sectors.

points.title: Dedicated SDRs
points.description: Human experts embedded in your motion—your tone, your ICP, your calendar—not a shared pool with divided attention.

points.title: Full stack included
points.description: We run a full outbound software suite with our own systems and tools, so your campaigns stay fast, consistent, and fully managed.

points.title: Prospecting strategy
points.description: ICP definition, list building, and message testing aimed at buyers who actually close in your category.

points.title: Campaign management
points.description: Daily execution, follow-up discipline, and iteration on what converts—not one-off blasts.

points.title: OG Pulse Monitoring
points.description: Total visibility into the engine. Access live call recordings and logs in The OG Pulse Transparency Dashboard so you never have to wonder if the work is being done.

process.label: How it works
process.title: From ICP to meetings on your calendar
process.subtitle: The hybrid model: combining elite human communication with smart research workflows for maximum efficiency—so you always know what happens next.

steps.title: Define your ideal customer profile
steps.description: We align on firmographics, roles, triggers, and disqualifiers so every touch targets real buyers.

steps.title: Build a target account list
steps.description: Research and list building so your team works the right companies—not the easiest CSV download.

steps.title: Launch multi-channel outreach
steps.description: Coordinated cold calling, email, and LinkedIn based on what fits your market and motion.

steps.title: Qualify interested prospects
steps.description: Conversations and replies are qualified against your criteria before anyone gets your AE’s time.

steps.title: Book meetings directly into your calendar
steps.description: Qualified discovery calls land on your schedule. Your job is to run a great call and close.

services.label: What we run
services.title: Outbound execution your cell owns
services.subtitle: Everything before the demo: research, outreach, qualification, and handoff—inside your stack where you want it.
activities: CRM integration (HubSpot, Salesforce, and common stacks)
services.closingLine: Software, management, and HR sit with us—you get a managed seat, The OG Pulse Transparency Dashboard, and full visibility into meetings booked.

whySouthAfrica.label: Why South African SDRs
whySouthAfrica.title: Elite Talent. Global Arbitrage.
whySouthAfrica.subtitle: South Africa is a strong fit for global outbound teams: native-level English, timezone overlap, and serious cost leverage—without sacrificing quality.

points.title: Native-level English
points.description: Clear, professional communication on calls and in writing—what your prospects expect from a serious vendor.

points.title: Strong sales culture
points.description: A deep bench of reps used to B2B outreach, coaching, and metric-driven work.

points.title: Global timezone overlap
points.description: Coverage that lines up with when your buyers are at their desks—without asking your team to work graveyard shifts.

points.title: 70% savings vs. many local hires
points.description: Global arbitrage without cutting corners—your seat includes the full software stack (Apollo, LinkedIn Sales Navigator, CRM, dialer) so you are not buying tools twice.

points.title: Motivated, dedicated teams
points.description: Reps who treat your pipeline as their job—because it is.

testimonials.quote: Outbound-Growth gave us a reliable outbound rhythm. Their SDRs sounded like part of our team and kept our AE calendar busy with real conversations.
testimonials.author: Client partner
testimonials.title: VP Sales

testimonials.quote: We did not want to hire and train SDRs in London. The South Africa team integrated into HubSpot and Slack quickly; The OG Pulse Transparency Dashboard made oversight straightforward.
testimonials.author: Client partner
testimonials.title: Head of Growth
